headline: A Look At American Express (AXP) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback And Mixed Returns
summary: Recent performance snapshot American Express (AXP) has drawn fresh attention after recent trading, with the stock closing at US$312.30. Short term returns are mixed, with a gain of 0.5% over one day and a decline of 0.4% over the past week. Over longer periods, the stock is up 3% over the past 3 months and 4.6% over the past year, while the year to date return is down 16.2%. That context supports a closer look at how current pricing compares with the company’s fundamentals. See our latest...
